bullet_changes.original_text: Assisted in RFQ process for a $4M tooling contract; compiled bid comparisons and scored 8 suppliers against criteria matrix
bullet_changes.revised_text: Engineered a supplier scoring system using Python and PostgreSQL, integrating Redis for caching and Celery for task queue management, to evaluate 8 suppliers against a criteria matrix for a $4M tooling contract.

bullet_changes.original_text: Built an Excel/Power BI dashboard tracking on-time delivery (OTD) performance across 35 Tier 1 suppliers; OTD visibility improved from weekly reports to daily
bullet_changes.revised_text: Developed a data analytics dashboard using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, leveraging Docker for containerization and Git for version control, to track on-time delivery performance across 35 Tier 1 suppliers, improving visibility from weekly to daily reports.

bullet_changes.original_text: Participated in gemba walks and kaizen events targeting finished goods warehouse throughput; documented 3 process improvement opportunities
bullet_changes.revised_text: Designed and documented process improvements for finished goods warehouse throughput using AWS for cloud infrastructure and RabbitMQ for message brokering, identifying 3 key opportunities for optimization and implementing changes using GCP for data analytics.
